positive: A highly stylized, minimalistic illustration of a celestial astronaut floating through a vibrant nebula. The astronaut is depicted in a clean, geometric suit with glowing accents, giving a strong silhouette against a dramatic background of swirling cosmic dust and distant, ringed planets. The overall aesthetic should be retro-futuristic vaporwave meeting modern scientific illustration, utilizing deep indigo, cosmic violet, electric turquoise, and crisp white contrast. Central composition, perfect for t-shirt printing, with bold linework and clean vector-like areas of solid color. Studio quality, high contrast, flat graphic design, maximal pop art energy, perfect print resolution.
negative: low resolution, blurry, fuzzy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noise, grain, messy, dirty, noise, copyright, trademark, messy lines
